<?php namespace Spatie\Permission\Traits; use Spatie\Permission\PermissionRegistrar; trait RefreshesPermissionCache { public static function bootRefreshesPermissionCache() { static::saved(function () { app(PermissionRegistrar::class)->forgetCachedPermissions(); }); static::deleted(function () { app(PermissionRegistrar::class)->forgetCachedPermissions(); }); } }
